creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The update is done with some changes including: 

- Change the name of the optional patch to patch-ba so that there will 
be less chance that we should rename this file when adding new 
non-optional patch file. 
- Add pre-clean target to remove the optional patch from the patches directory. 
- Added back $Id$ line.
